rendered_text_probe_notes: Raw HTTP and rendered text both exposed the listing-level phrase 'docked in Croatia'. Treat this as research evidence only and mark the source as requires_rendered_text_for_location until parser logic is intentionally updated.
Croatia appeared in general market copy on the public listing page, but no listing-level docked/moored/lying phrase was confirmed.
The public used-boats page returned 200 and mentioned Croatia, but no listing-level location phrase such as 'docked in Croatia' was confirmed from the single rendered-text check.
